title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, argues that most AI agents don't actually work due to error compounding across multi-step workflows, and that the industry has normalized unreliability. He advocates for building reliable agents and emphasizes that taste and proof of work matter more than raw code performance.
